value: Functional BOLD MRI (choice task, three runs)
Events.tsv files (task events, one per BOLD run)

evidence.quote: three functional BOLD runs of the choice task
three single-band reference images, one corresponding to each BOLD run
one events.tsv file for each BOLD run

short_desc_en.value: An OpenNeuro dataset (ds008066) released under CC0 containing raw MRI data from 40 participants performing a choice overload fMRI task with six decoy/no-decoy conditions (3, 9, or 24 options), organized in BIDS format with one T1-weighted anatomical image and three functional BOLD runs (each with a single-band reference image and an events.tsv file) per participant.

evidence.quote: This dataset contains raw MRI data from a choice overload fMRI task. Data are organized in BIDS format.
Participants completed a choice task with six experimental conditions
three functional BOLD runs of the choice task

short_desc_es.value: Un conjunto de datos de OpenNeuro (ds008066) publicado bajo licencia CC0 con datos crudos de resonancia magnetica de 40 participantes que realizan una tarea de sobrecarga de eleccion con seis condiciones de senuelo/sin senuelo (3, 9 o 24 opciones), organizado en formato BIDS con una imagen anatomica T1 y tres corridas funcionales BOLD (cada una con su imagen de referencia de banda unica y su archivo events.tsv) por participante.

evidence.quote: This dataset contains raw MRI data from a choice overload fMRI task. Data are organized in BIDS format.
Participants completed a choice task with six experimental conditions
three functional BOLD runs of the choice task

access_steps.step_en: Go to the OpenNeuro dataset page (accession ds008066, referenced by DOI 10.18112/openneuro.ds008066.v1.0.0)
access_steps.step_es: Ve a la pagina del dataset en OpenNeuro (accession ds008066, referenciado por el DOI 10.18112/openneuro.ds008066.v1.0.0)

access_steps.step_en: Download the dataset directly, no account or credentialing required (CC0 license, open access platform)
access_steps.step_es: Descarga el dataset directamente, sin cuenta ni credencial (licencia CC0, plataforma de acceso abierto)
access_steps.eta: depends on bandwidth (685 files, ~27 GB total per repository record)

access_steps.step_en: Explore the BIDS structure per participant (one T1w anatomical image, three BOLD functional runs, three single-band reference images) and read each run's events.tsv (onset, duration, trial_type) plus task-choice_events.json for condition descriptions
access_steps.step_es: Explora la estructura BIDS por participante (una imagen anatomica T1, tres corridas funcionales BOLD, tres imagenes de referencia de banda unica) y lee el events.tsv de cada corrida (onset, duration, trial_type) ademas de task-choice_events.json para las descripciones de las condiciones

starter_code.python:
import pandas as pd
import nibabel as nib

# Each functional run has a companion events.tsv with columns: onset, duration, trial_type
events = pd.read_csv('sub-01/func/sub-01_task-choice_run-1_events.tsv', sep='\t')
print(events['trial_type'].value_counts())  # six conditions: d3, d9, d24, n3, n9, n24

# One T1-weighted anatomical image per participant (BIDS layout)
t1w = nib.load('sub-01/anat/sub-01_T1w.nii.gz')
print(t1w.shape)
starter_code.r:
library(data.table)

# Each functional run has a companion events.tsv with columns: onset, duration, trial_type
events <- fread('sub-01/func/sub-01_task-choice_run-1_events.tsv')
table(events$trial_type)  # six conditions: d3, d9, d24, n3, n9, n24
